title: Premature Baby Home Care: The Essential Nursery Checklist
summary: A comprehensive home care checklist detailing room heating parameters (22°C to 24°C), room hygiene standards, dust mite exclusion, clothing layering guidelines, and newborn sleep hygiene. It includes practical tips on nursery ventilation and nursery setup away from AC vents.

title: Understanding the NICU: Medical Terms & Equipment Guide
summary: A parent-friendly dictionary explaining neonatal ICU equipment (incubators, phototherapy lights, mechanical ventilators, CPAP, nasal cannulas) and common terms (TPN, bradycardia, ROP screenings, apnea of prematurity) to reduce parental stress during hospital rounds.

title: Daily Feeding & Hydration Log Sheet
summary: A printable daily grid sheet for recording expressed breast milk (EBM) feed volumes, gavage tube timings, transition feedings, daily vitamin supplement doses, and wet/dirty diaper tracking. It helps parents monitor hydration levels and easily share accurate records with their pediatrician.

title: Preterm Developmental Milestones & Corrected Age Chart
summary: Detailed, step-by-step instructions on calculating corrected age based on birth gestational week and due date. Includes a physical milestone tracking index adjusted for preterm infants covering motor skills, visual tracking, social smiling, and cooing.

title: Kangaroo Mother Care: Step-by-Step Position Guide
summary: An illustrated positioning guide detailing upright frog positioning, chest placement, secure wrapping techniques, and skin-to-skin temperature regulation. Features critical safety red flags detailing when to stop KMC and return the infant to the incubator.

title: Ready for Discharge: Hospital to Home Transition Guide
summary: A comprehensive checklist outlining pediatric appointment scheduling, emergency sign indices (fever, rapid breathing, skin paleness), nursery boundary setup, sanitization protocols, and baby car seat safety guidelines to secure a smooth NICU-to-home transition.

title: Questions to Ask Your Pediatrician & Neonatal Care Team
summary: Printable lists of questions categorized by care stage (NICU, Feeding, ROP Eye Screenings, Audiology Hearing Re-tests, Specialist Referrals, Home Care). It enables parents to confidently document answers and coordinate care during checkups.

title: Emotional Resilience & Caregiver Support Manual
summary: A mental health manual for parents outlining caregiver burnout indicators, partner night-shift scheduling templates (evening vs. early morning split shifts), relative boundary guidelines for Indian households, and non-contact family chore lists.
